name: an-dr-ai
description: Unified AI CLI interface. Detects Claude, Codex, and GitHub Copilot CLIs and exposes a shared API for other extensions.

an-dr-ai.preferredCli.description: Preferred AI CLI. 'auto' uses the first detected one (claude → codex → gh-copilot).

an-dr-ai.prompts.findFlaws.default:
You are a senior code reviewer. Review this diff for:
- Logic errors and edge cases
- Security issues (injection, auth, data exposure)
- Breaking changes not obvious from the diff
- Missing error handling
- Test coverage gaps
- Anything that will cause pain in 3 months

Be blunt. No praise. Flag unknowns explicitly.
an-dr-ai.prompts.findFlaws.description: Prompt used by the 'Find Flaws in Commit' command.

an-dr-ai.prompts.reviewFile.default:
You are a senior code reviewer. Review this file for:
- Architecture and structural issues
- Security vulnerabilities
- Dead code or unnecessary complexity
- Missing error handling
- Anything that should be refactored before this goes to production

Be blunt. No praise. Flag unknowns explicitly.
an-dr-ai.prompts.reviewFile.description: Prompt used by the 'Review File' command.

an-dr-ai.outputChannel.description: Name of the VS Code output channel used to display AI responses.
